name: Armada Agent
description: Armada agent plugin — managed team communication with ACL, status reporting, and maintenance

role.description: This instance's role (e.g. development, research, project-manager)

contacts.description: Allowed contacts — ACL-enforced list of instances this agent can communicate with

idleTimeoutMs.description: Idle timeout in ms before task is abandoned (default 180000)

hardTimeoutMs.description: Hard timeout in ms before task is force-completed (default 1800000)

armadaApiUrl.description: Armada control plane API URL for task reporting

armadaApiToken.description: Armada control plane API auth token

proxyUrl.description: Node agent proxy URL — preferred over armadaApiUrl for remote nodes

projects.description: Project names this agent belongs to
